translations.es: Es una calle de sentido único.
translations.fr: C'est une rue à sens unique.
translations.it: È una strada a senso unico.
translations.pt: É uma rua de sentido único.
translations.ro: Este o stradă cu sens unic.
translations.ja: あれは一方通行の道です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject; refers to a situation or entity identified by the speaker.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article introducing the noun phrase.
Common noun serving as the predicate nominal.

sentences.target: Wir parken nicht in der Einbahnstraße.

translations.de: Wir parken nicht in der Einbahnstraße.
translations.en: We're not parking on the one-way street.
translations.es: No vamos a aparcar en la calle de sentido único.
translations.fr: On ne se gare pas dans la rue à sens unique.
translations.it: Non parcheggiamo in quella strada a senso unico.
translations.ko: 우리는 그 일방통행 도로에 주차하지 않을 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不在单行道上停车。
translations.yue: 我哋唔喺嗰條單行路度泊車。
translations.ru: Мы не будем парковаться на этой односторонней улице.
translations.pt: Não vamos estacionar na rua de sentido único.
translations.vi: Chúng ta không đỗ xe trên đường một chiều.
translations.ar: لن نركن في شارع باتجاه واحد.
translations.nl: We parkeren niet in de eenrichtingsstraat.
translations.uk: Ми не будемо паркуватися на цій односторонній вулиці.
translations.hi: हम उस एकतरफ़ा सड़क पर पार्क नहीं करेंगे.
translations.pl: Nie parkujemy na tej ulicy jednokierunkowej.
translations.nb: Vi parkerer ikke i den enveiskjørte gaten.
translations.id: Kita tidak parkir di jalan satu arah.
translations.sv: Vi parkerar inte på den enkelriktade gatan.
translations.ro: Nu parcăm pe strada cu sens unic.
translations.da: Vi parkerer ikke på den ensrettede gade.
translations.ja: その一方通行の道には駐車しません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb (finite, present, 1st person plural) expressing the action.
Negation particle; scopes over the verb phrase to negate the proposition.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase; selects dative for location.
Definite article (dative feminine here) marking the NP as definite and indicating case.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'in' expressing the location.

sentences.target: Die Bäckerei liegt in einer Einbahnstraße.

translations.de: Die Bäckerei liegt in einer Einbahnstraße.
translations.en: The bakery is on a one-way street.
translations.es: La panadería está en una calle de sentido único.
translations.fr: La boulangerie est dans une rue à sens unique.
translations.it: La panetteria è in una strada a senso unico.
translations.zh-Hans: 那家面包店在一条单行道上。
translations.yue: 嗰間麵包舖喺一條單行路度。
translations.ru: Пекарня находится на улице с односторонним движением.
translations.pt: A padaria fica numa rua de sentido único.
translations.vi: Tiệm bánh nằm trên một con đường một chiều.
translations.ar: المخبز يقع في شارع باتجاه واحد.
translations.nl: De bakkerij ligt in een eenrichtingsstraat.
translations.uk: Пекарня розташована на вулиці з одностороннім рухом.
translations.hu: A pékség egy egyirányú utcában van.
translations.hi: बेकरी एक एकतरफ़ा सड़क पर है.
translations.nb: Bakeriet ligger i en enveiskjørt gate.
translations.id: Toko roti berada di jalan satu arah.
translations.sv: Bageriet ligger på en enkelriktad gata.
translations.ro: Brutăria este pe o stradă cu sens unic.
translations.da: Bageriet ligger på en ensrettet gade.
translations.ja: パン屋は一方通行の通りにあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the subject NP as specific/definite.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Intransitive lexical verb (present, 3rd person singular) expressing location/existence.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; governs dative for static location.
Indefinite article (dative feminine) marking the NP as non-specific.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'in' indicating the place.

sentences.target: Das Navi ignoriert die Einbahnstraße mal wieder.
sentences.reading: /das ˈnaːvi ɪɡnoˈʁiːɐ̯t diː ˈaɪ̯nbaːnˌʃtʁaːsə maːl ˈviːdɐ/

translations.de: Das Navi ignoriert die Einbahnstraße mal wieder.
translations.ipa: /das ˈnaːvi ɪɡnoˈʁiːɐ̯t diː ˈaɪ̯nbaːnˌʃtʁaːsə maːl ˈviːdɐ/
translations.en: The GPS is ignoring the one-way street again.
translations.es: El GPS vuelve a ignorar la calle de sentido único.
translations.fr: Le GPS ignore encore la rue à sens unique.
translations.it: Il navigatore ignora di nuovo la strada a senso unico.
translations.pt: O GPS está ignorando a rua de sentido único de novo.
translations.tr: Navigasyon yine tek yönü görmezden geliyor.
translations.vi: GPS lại phớt lờ đường một chiều.
translations.ar: النظام الملاحي يتجاهل شارع باتجاه واحد مرة أخرى.
translations.nl: De navigatie negeert de eenrichtingsstraat weer.
translations.hu: A GPS megint figyelmen kívül hagyja az egyirányú utcát.
translations.hi: जीपीएस फिर से एकतरफ़ा सड़क को नज़रअंदाज़ कर रहा है.
translations.el: Το GPS αγνοεί πάλι τον μονόδρομο.
translations.nb: GPS-en ignorerer den enveiskjørte gaten igjen.
translations.id: GPS lagi-lagi mengabaikan jalan satu arah.
translations.sv: GPS:en ignorerar den enkelriktade gatan igen.
translations.ro: GPS-ul ignoră din nou strada cu sens unic.
translations.da: GPS'en ignorerer den ensrettede gade igen.
translations.fi: GPS taas jättää yksisuuntaisen kadun huomiotta.
translations.ja: カーナビがまた一方通行を無視している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the subject NP ('Navi') as definite.
Common noun; head of the subject NP referring to the navigation device.
Transitive lexical verb (present, 3rd person singular) taking a direct object.
Definite article (accusative feminine) marking the direct object NP.
Common noun; direct object of 'ignoriert'.
Adverbial particle adding a colloquial, attenuating/iterative nuance; part of the adverbial phrase 'mal wieder'.
Adverb expressing repetition; modifies the verb phrase.

The GPS is ignoring the one-way street again.
